title: iberis ciliata var. vestita
intro: Iberis ciliata var. vestita, also known as the rock candy or candytuft, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Iberis ciliata var. vestita include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Iberis ciliata var. vestita include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
